file.string: Enter your credentials to access your treatment plan
Before we begin, please review and accept the following terms regarding your treatment data and AI assistance.
I understand that OrthoCare AI provides guidance based on my data but does not replace professional medical advice.
I agree to have my treatment data synced with the Dental Integrated Analytics System for clinical monitoring.
I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.
Answer questions about your appliance care
Remind you about elastics and hygiene
If you experience severe pain, bleeding, or trauma, please contact your clinic immediately or visit the emergency room.
